lines.line: Nanjo: Unforgivable! You scum!!
Yukino: Everyone, be careful!
Nanjo: Kirishima! Get back!
Elly: No problem!{wait}I may not look it,{nl} but I'm rather good with a blade.
Yukino: Eriko!{nl} These aren't normal foes!
Mark: Honestly,{nl} you sheltered little lady!
Maki: I'm not gonna lose!
Nanjo: Sonomura, don't push yourself!
Brown: Waaaaaah!?{wait}{nl} I-I'm gonna get killed!
Mark: Nothing for it!!{nl} No hard feelings, old man!
Demon Cop: Death! Death! Death!{wait}{nl} Make it quick and waste 'em!
Black Suit (R): A leak would be bad.{nl} Get rid of them.
Black Suit (L): Understood.
Nanjo: Kandoriii!
Tesso: Squeeek!!
Mark: What the heck is this?!
Brown: Wahaha!{wait}{nl} Looks like a pushover!
Elly: Now that I look closely,{nl} it's quite Lovely!
Ayase: I-It's kinda cute!
Maki: S-So cute~!
Mark: Shut up!!
Queen: Wahahahaha!{wait}{wait}My paintings are the world's best!{wait}{wait}{nl} And my beauty, the cosmos'!{fffb}{fff7}Now, hurry up and die!
Maki: Senri! Please, stop!{fffb}{fff7}If you'll only hurt everyone more,{wait}...{wait}...{wait}{nl} then I have to fight you!
Queen: Hahahaha!{fffb}{fff7}Your troubled face! Face! Face!{wait}It's positively delightful!
Reiji: Out of my way, small fry!!
Mark: No time to dawdle! I'll finish this fast!!
Sarwa: I'll throw those very words{nl} right back at you!
Nanjo: Here it comes!
Kandori: You won't die easy...{wait}{nl} Are you prepared?
Mark: Shut up!!{wait}{nl} That's our line!!
Brown: Heh!{nl} Big talk!
Elly: Shut up!{fffb}{fff7}A man who can't speak his own words{nl} has no right to judge anyone.
Ayase: Big words won't fool me, y'know!
Reiji: Spew your nonsense in hell!{wait}I'll knock you down there now.
Pandora: Ruuuuuaaaah!{wait}Now, let's vanish together!
Yukino: Whoa!{wait}{nl} What is this thing?!
Toro: Hee hee hee hee hee hee!{wait}Too slow, too slow, too slow!{wait}Take this!!
Hypnos: Let me teach you the wonder{nl} of a world of dreams...{wait}an eternal dream you never wake from...
Yukino: Hmph!{wait}{nl} Save the sleep-talk for bed!
Ayase: Bleeegh~{wait}{nl} Super ugly~!!
Thanatos: How dare you!!{wait}{nl} Yuriko won't forgive you!{wait}I won't forgive you!!
Ayase: Ayase...{nl} just can't anymore~...
